name: solc-version
text:
Version constraint ^0.8.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.0 (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#8)

text: Compiler version ^0.8.0 does not satisfy the ^0.8.24 semver requirement

name: timestamp
text:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#148-159) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp - exchangeRateTime <= maximumRateDelay,Exchange rate outdated) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#156)

name: encode-packed-collision
text:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#148-159) calls abi.encodePacked() with multiple dynamic arguments:
	- Exchange(transactor,targetCurrency,msg.value,exchangeRate,block.timestamp,string(abi.encodePacked(bridgeURL,targetCurrency))) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#158)
